title: Set up flat fee and overages pricing
description: Charge customers a flat recurring fee with overage charges for usage beyond included limits.

steps.title: Create a customer
steps.description: Create the customer that will subscribe to the pricing plan.

nodes.title: Create a customer
nodes.review_prompt: Confirm the implementation calls the intended Stripe API and reuses any IDs needed by later steps.

steps.title: Create a pricing plan
steps.description: Create a pricing plan and usage meter for the overage component.

nodes.title: Create a Pricing Plan
nodes.review_prompt: Confirm the implementation calls the intended Stripe API and reuses any IDs needed by later steps.

nodes.title: Create a meter
nodes.review_prompt: Confirm the implementation calls the intended Stripe API and reuses any IDs needed by later steps.

steps.title: Create a rate card
steps.description: Create the rate card, metered item, and graduated overage rate.

nodes.title: Create a rate card
nodes.review_prompt: Confirm the implementation calls the intended Stripe API and reuses any IDs needed by later steps.

nodes.title: Create a metered item
nodes.review_prompt: Confirm the implementation calls the intended Stripe API and reuses any IDs needed by later steps.

nodes.title: Add graduated rate to rate card
nodes.review_prompt: Confirm the implementation calls the intended Stripe API and reuses any IDs needed by later steps.

nodes.title: Attach rate card to Pricing Plan
nodes.review_prompt: Confirm the implementation calls the intended Stripe API and reuses any IDs needed by later steps.

steps.title: Create a license fee
steps.description: Create the licensed item and flat recurring license fee.

nodes.title: Create a licensed item
nodes.review_prompt: Confirm the implementation calls the intended Stripe API and reuses any IDs needed by later steps.

nodes.title: Create a license fee
nodes.review_prompt: Confirm the implementation calls the intended Stripe API and reuses any IDs needed by later steps.

nodes.title: Attach license fee to Pricing Plan
nodes.review_prompt: Confirm the implementation calls the intended Stripe API and reuses any IDs needed by later steps.

steps.title: Subscribe the customer
steps.description: Set the live pricing plan version and create a Checkout Session for the subscription.

nodes.title: Set live version to latest
nodes.review_prompt: Confirm the implementation calls the intended Stripe API and reuses any IDs needed by later steps.

nodes.title: Create checkout session
nodes.review_prompt: Confirm the implementation calls the intended Stripe API and reuses any IDs needed by later steps.

nodes.title: Complete the checkout
nodes.review_prompt: Open the app and confirm the user-facing flow works as described.

nodes.title: Wait for servicing activated event
nodes.review_prompt: Run `stripe trigger v2.billing.pricing_plan_subscription.servicing_activated` and confirm the handler processes the signed event correctly.
